situationalContext: Lynch is in Engineering, trying to get warp power back to rescue the shuttlecraft.
userQuery: Forget the final check. Initiate start-up sequence.

situationalContext: Lynch is overriding the computer's checklist to initiate warp drive.
userQuery: Override. We are going directly to start-up.

situationalContext: Lynch is manually setting the matter-antimatter injector ratio for warp drive.
userQuery: Understood. Now. Prime matter-antimatter injectors. Set ratio at twenty-five to one

situationalContext: Worf is setting up the computer for a critical parallel transport operation from the planet surface.
userQuery: Set the computer. When the energy level reaches two point six point two zero five, automatically beam up Troi and Prieto. We'll do a parallel transport on the Captain.
